name: leave-management-system
description: Full-stack Leave Management System with Vue.js frontend and Node.js/Express backend

scripts.install:all: npm run install:backend && npm run install:frontend
scripts.build: npm run install:all && npm run build:frontend
scripts.dev: npm run install:all && concurrently "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend"
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run start:backend
